findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "ping" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Connectivity check — returns server version and current timestamp. Use to verify MCP server is reachable before calling other tools.

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
